name: Irish Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into large chunks.
2. Peel the vegetables and slice them thickly.
3. Chop the parsley.
4. Choose a pot with a well-fitting lid.
5. Add ingredients in layers, starting and finishing with potatoes.
6. Pour in water and season to taste.
7. Cover and place on low heat for about 2 1/2 hours until the meat is tender and the potatoes have thickened the liquid.
8. The dish may also be made with lamb, which requires only 1 1/2 hours cooking time.
